$comment: Quick-reference index of this ratchet flows (id + summary + entry + node count). Generated by tools/index_flows.ps1 - re-run after adding or changing a flow. The engine discovers flows by scanning each flow folder chain.json; this file is for fast human/agent reference.

flows.summary: Add a new file/class/driver/feature to the active workspace project; rebuild the whole project to verify, repair up to twice, and record it.
Generate one composed unit against the accumulated project, build the whole project, repair once, register.
Answer a question grounded in the knowledge base - retrieve, then respond from only what was retrieved.
Compose a system from a dir of specs: plan the build order, generate each unit in dependency order against the accumulated project, then build the whole thing.
Refactor a function, fix an error, or apply a change to an existing file in the active workspace; rebuild the whole project to verify and repair up to twice.
Generate a self-contained code snippet, check it with the single-file oracle, repair up to twice.
